recommendations.title: Switching Goals
recommendations.overview: Twin sisters Emma and Sam come up with a scheme to switch places so each can play in the soccer team they prefer.

recommendations.title: Invisible Sister
recommendations.overview: Teenager Cleo's school science project goes quite awry, causing her popular older sister Molly to go invisible.

recommendations.genres: Animation, Music, Comedy, Adventure, Drama, Family, Fantasy

recommendations.director: Tom Ruegger, Rusty Mills, Liz Holzman

recommendations.title: Steven Universe: The Movie
recommendations.genres: TV Movie, Animation, Family, Adventure, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: Two years after bringing peace to the galaxy, Steven Universe sees his past come back to haunt him in the form of a deranged Gem who wants to destroy the Earth.

recommendations.title: John Mulaney: Kid Gorgeous at Radio City
recommendations.overview: John Mulaney relays stories from his childhood and "SNL," eviscerates the value of college and laments getting older in this electric comedy special.

recommendations.title: Richie Rich's Christmas Wish

recommendations.title: The Ewok Adventure
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Family, Fantasy, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Wicket the Ewok and his friends agree to help two shipwrecked human children, Mace and Cindel, on a quest to find their parents.

recommendations.title: The Boy Who Cried Werewolf
recommendations.overview: A Californian family inherits a castle in Romania. This is especially exciting to the son, who is obsessed with monsters. And he is not disappointed.

recommendations.title: Drake & Josh Go Hollywood
recommendations.genres: Family, Comedy, Adventure, TV Movie, Crime
recommendations.overview: When Drake and Josh accidentally send their little sister Megan on a plane to L.A., they soon find themselves in the middle of a dangerous situation.

recommendations.title: Wizards of Waverly Place: Wizard School
recommendations.overview: When Alex is caught using magic to clean her room she is forced to go to wizard school with Justin. Max and Jerry camp out on the terrace to prove their manhood.
